name: cc-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for pragmatic engineering workflows.

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development workflow for Claude Code: constitution, specs, clarify, plan, tasks, implement, sync, trace.

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Initialize a new repo with best-practice defaults: .gitignore, .gitattributes, README, LICENSE, .editorconfig, .dockerignore, devcontainer, linters/formatters, and GitHub Actions CI for Node/TS, Python, Go, generic, or docs-only repos.
